---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the plugin
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

### What you want to do

The use case in your own words. "I want to be able to X so that Y."

### Why the current surface doesn't cover it

Which existing tool or env var came closest? What's missing?

### Proposed shape

A sketch of the API or behavior. Optional — if you'd rather discuss
than design, say so.

### Alternatives you considered

Workarounds you've already tried, or paths you ruled out.

### Anything else

Related issues, links to similar features in other Hermes platform
plugins, screenshots if it's UI-related.
